purpose: Bind the completed action-frozen servo load-bias campaign, recover its fold-selected per-episode predictions, and quantify uncertainty without reopening model selection.

bootstrap.role: post-selection uncertainty audit of already-frozen fold predictions; no candidate selection or threshold changes
bootstrap.dependence_boundary: The 11 episodes come from one retained acquisition session. This bootstrap quantifies conditional whole-episode variability inside that session, not independent-session or physical-population generalization.

boundary_disclosure.interpretation: The bounded load-response model class is supported by this retained-data diagnostic, but the coefficient magnitude is not identified. The grid must not be expanded post hoc in this campaign.

claim_boundary: A passing closeout verifies an action-frozen simulator trace-fidelity advancement conditional on the retained single-session episode set only. It does not verify independent-session generalization, a physical torque parameter, grasp improvement, contact calibration, composite simulator promotion, policy improvement, or physical transfer.
